mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_file (id, document_id, branch_name, title, current_file_id, current_version, file_type, status, create_by, user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{documentId}, #{branchName}, #{title}, #{currentFileId}, #{currentVersion}, #{fileType}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{userId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM document_file WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM document_file WHERE status = 'active' AND branch_name = 'main' ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM document_file WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND branch_name = 'main' AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE document_file SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id}
